title: Where to find the scripts in Japanese
display_title: Where to find the scripts in Japanese
wikitext:
[]: Where to find the scripts in Japanese             Quote Post by Ultrahuntr » Tue Jan 31, 2017 2:36 am I'm curious as to if there are easily accessible scripts (in Japanese). I'm wanting to work on my Japanese and figured that having the script would help with that. It's been awhile (too long) since I've been here. If this is the wrong place to ask this, feel free to point me to the right one.

[]: Re: Where to find the scripts in Japanese             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 31, 2017 3:58 am If you aren't too picky, the dialogue alone can be found here . (I just quickly Googled it up and can't vouch for its accuracy.) If it's the official scripts you want, these are available on the Japanese DVD(/BD?) releases, and someone would have to post the full set of screen captures. I'm pretty sure these are actually on our server somewhere, but someone with access (which I don't have ATM) would need to furnish a URL.

[]: Re: Where to find the scripts in Japanese             Quote Post by Ultrahuntr » Tue Jan 31, 2017 11:25 am A quick google translate test (not the most accurate, obviously) seems to show that these check out, so thanks! Obviously there is a high probability of errors, but this will still help me in regards to working on my Japanese, so thanks a lot! That said, if someone did happen to link to the actual scripts as well, that would also be appreciated.

[]: Re: Where to find the scripts in Japanese             Quote Post by SoryuUberAlles » Tue Jan 31, 2017 7:03 pm So what source is used for the FGC?

[]: Re: Where to find the scripts in Japanese             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 17, 2017 3:17 pm The official scripts, of course.

[]: Re: Where to find the scripts in Japanese             Quote Post by SoryuUberAlles » Sun Feb 19, 2017 12:09 am Reichu wrote: If it's the official scripts you want, these are available on the Japanese DVD(/BD?) releases, and someone would have to post the full set of screen captures.
